form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (30.33) over 525m at The Meadows. Aided by the inside draw but will need everything to go her way.

form.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 450m. Mixing her form but shapes as a genuine contender under these conditions.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked in back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Bendigo (24.22) in a SE, finishing a 5.5 lengths third. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 5 over 435m at Sale in a Grade 5. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.12) when fourth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Has two wins and three placings from eight starts from the draw. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 390m at Shepparton beaten 16 lengths (23.22) behind Paw Gusto in a Grade 5 on April 6. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sale (24.85) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 9 length fifth. Has two wins and three placings from 10 starts from the draw. Has ability and should be around the money.
